title: paspalum repens
intro: Paspalum repens, also known as kikuyu grass, is a perennial grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paspalum repens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to promote wound healing and reduce pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Paspalum repens include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for topical application and internal use.
